user.title: Connection type
user.description: Choose the mode for the Alby Hub connection.

cloud.title: Cloud mode (NWC)
cloud.description: Paste the NWC connection string from Alby Hub. Learn more: https://github.com/northpower25/ha-btc-alby-hub-integration/blob/main/docs/handbook.en.md

expert.title: Expert mode
expert.description: Use local hub URL and optionally prioritize ws://<host>:3334 relay proxy.
